Inventory

Backpack

Type: ContainerQuantity: 1Equipped: YesAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 2 gp

A Backpack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot. It can also serve as a saddlebag.

Book

Type: LootQuantity: 1Equipped: NoAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 25 gp

A Book contains fiction or nonfiction. If you consult an accurate nonfiction Book about its topic, you gain a +5 bonus to Intelligence (&Reference[skill=Arcana], &Reference[skill=History], &Reference[skill=Nature], or &Reference[skill=Religion]) checks you make about that topic.

Brinco Dos Mortos

Type: ContainerQuantity: 1Equipped: NoAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 0 gp
[object Object]

Chain

Type: EquipmentQuantity: 2Equipped: YesAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 5 gp

As a @action[Utilize|XPHB] action, you can wrap a Chain around an unwilling creature within 5 feet of yourself that has the &Reference[condition=Grappled], &Reference[condition=Incapacitated], or &Reference[condition=Restrained] condition if you succeed on a [[/save ability=str dc=13]] (&Reference[skill=Athletics]) check. If the creature's legs are bound, the creature has the &Reference[condition=Restrained] condition until it escapes. Escaping the Chain requires the creature to make a successful [[/save ability=dex dc=18]] (&Reference[skill=Acrobatics]) check as an action. Bursting the Chain requires a successful [[/save ability=str dc=20]] (&Reference[skill=Athletics]) check as an action.

Corpos

Type: ConsumableQuantity: 2Equipped: NoAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 0 gp
[object Object]

Dagger

Type: WeaponQuantity: 1Equipped: YesAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 2 gp

Mastery: Nick. When you make the extra attack of the Light property, you can make it as part of the @action[Attack|XPHB] action instead of as a @variantrule[Bonus Action|XPHB]. You can make this extra attack only once per turn.

Ink

Type: ConsumableQuantity: 1Equipped: NoAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 10 gpUses: 1/1

Ink comes in a 1-ounce bottle, which provides enough ink to write about 500 pages.

Ink Pen

Type: EquipmentQuantity: 1Equipped: YesAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 2 cp

Using @item[Ink|XPHB], an Ink Pen is used to write or draw.

Lamp

Type: EquipmentQuantity: 1Equipped: YesAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 5 sp

A Lamp burns @item[Oil|XPHB] as fuel to cast @variantrule[Bright Light|XPHB] in a 15-foot radius and @variantrule[Dim Light|XPHB] for an additional 30 feet.

Loaf of Bread

Type: ConsumableQuantity: 30Equipped: NoAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 2 cpUses: 1/1
[object Object]

Oil

Type: ConsumableQuantity: 10Equipped: NoAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 1 spUses: 1/1

You can douse a creature, object, or space with Oil or use it as fuel, as detailed below.

Dousing a Creature or an Object. When you take the @action[Attack|XPHB] action, you can replace one of your attacks with throwing an Oil flask. Target one creature or object within 20 feet of yourself. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw (DC 8 plus your Dexterity modifier and @variantrule[Proficiency|XPHB|Proficiency Bonus]) or be covered in oil. If the target takes Fire damage before the oil dries (after 1 minute), the target takes an extra 5 Fire damage from burning oil.

Dousing a Space. You can take the @action[Utilize|XPHB] action to pour an Oil flask on level ground to cover a 5-foot-square area within 5 feet of yourself. If lit, the oil burns until the end of the turn 2 rounds from when the oil was lit (or 12 seconds) and deals 5 Fire damage to any creature that enters the area or ends its turn there. A creature can take this damage only once per turn.

Fuel. Oil serves as fuel for Lamps and Lanterns. Once lit, a flask of Oil burns for 6 hours in a Lamp or Lantern. That duration doesn't need to be consecutive; you can extinguish the burning Oil (as a @action[Utilize|XPHB] action) and rekindle it again until it has burned for a total of 6 hours.

Parchment

Type: LootQuantity: 10Equipped: NoAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 1 sp

One sheet of Parchment can hold about 250 handwritten words.

Sack

Type: ContainerQuantity: 1Equipped: YesAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 1 cp

A Sack holds up to 30 pounds within 1 cubic foot.

Shovel

Type: LootQuantity: 1Equipped: NoAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 2 gp

Working for 1 hour, you can use a Shovel to dig a hole that is 5 feet on each side in soil or similar material.

String

Type: LootQuantity: 2Equipped: NoAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 1 sp

String is 10 feet long. You can tie a knot in it as a @action[Utilize|XPHB] action.

Tent

Type: LootQuantity: 1Equipped: NoAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 2 gp

A Tent sleeps up to two Small or Medium creatures.

Tinderbox

Type: EquipmentQuantity: 1Equipped: YesAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 5 sp

A Tinderbox is a small container holding flint, fire steel, and tinder (usually dry cloth soaked in light oil) used to kindle a fire. Using it to light a @item[Candle|XPHB], @item[Lamp|XPHB], @item[Hooded Lantern|XPHB|Lantern], or @item[Torch|XPHB]—or anything else with exposed fuel—takes a @variantrule[Bonus Action|XPHB]. Lighting any other fire takes 1 minute.

Traveler's Clothes

Type: EquipmentQuantity: 1Equipped: YesAttunement: —Rarity: —Weight: [object Object]Price: 2 gp

Traveler's Clothes are resilient garments designed for travel in various environments.
